TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Donald John Trump ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Donald John Trump, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw United states ta' misuw hya' ga Donald John Trump, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. He was president until January 20, 2021. minqyanux ru qnxan 1964 kawas,Trump maki New York zyaw na hetay pqwasan biru.1964 kawas 6 byacing 14 ryax,Donald John Trump htgan beh New York Military Academy,hiya te payat laqi.hiya ru Maryanne,Elizabeth,Robert msqun mrkya's maki Jamaica Estates. mpuw cyugal kawas,hiya mqwas beh New York zyaw na hetay pqwasan biru ru 1964 kawas,mqwas beh Fordham krahu' pqwasan biru.sazing kawas 後,musa Pennsylvania krahu' pqwasan biru ru 1968 kawas 5 byacing masoq mqwas la. maki krahu' pqwasan biru,Trump magal payat seto' 選秀 maki Vietnam mciriq. ngasal 1977 kawas, Trump ru Ivana Zelníčková msqun la.maki cyugal laqi nya, Donald Jr.(htgan 1977 kawas ), Ivanka(htgan 1981 kawas) ru Eric(htgan 1984 kawas). 1988 kawas, Ivana ga squilq na Amerika. 1992 kawas,Donald John Trump ru Marla Maples wal likong la. hiya ru Maples maki kneril laqi nya(Tiffany lalu nya 1993 kawas htgan ).1993 kawas,hiya msqun la,1997 kawas ini squn maki,1999 kawas wal talax la. Marla mlahang Tiffany maki California mrkyas. 2005 kawas, Trump ru Slovenian mato Melania Knauss msqun la.hiya maki qutux laqi mlikuy nya,lalu Barron nya, htgan maki 2006 kawas. 2006 kawas,Melania magal squilq na Amerika. 1925 kawas, Boven htgan beh Kalamazoo Michigan .hiya yaya ru yaba kahul Netherlands ru Groningen . Boven mrkyas beh Kalamazoo ,mqwas beh Lincoln pqwasan biru.hiya blaq balay squilq na p'unro maki Kalamazoo. 1943 kawas.Boven masoq mqwas beh Central krahu' pqwasan biru.masoq mqwas lga,musa mtzyaw hetay la. masoq te sazing cinbwanan mciriq lga, Boven musa Kalamazoo maki hetay mrhuw na Amerika kragiy,hiya mqwas beh Western Michigan krach' pqwasan biru. Bill mqwas pcbaq biru. inbyaqan NYC Queens. hiya ga tesazing na laqi,cyux sazing qsuyan kneril,qutux qsuyan mlikuy ru qutux sswe mlikuy. magan cyugan kneril .cyux cyugan mlikuy ru sazing kneril laqi nya.cyux mopu suna. slokah Trump ini tbaku ru nbu quo ru maniq iyu. hiya hngan m'abi payat ru magal hga. qnxan na krahu' pqwasan biru 1943-1946 kawas,Boven mqwas beh Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.
S.PHON: *onal* *oħn trump rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *onal* *oħn trump, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *onal* *oħn trump, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħe was~ɕ pres~ɕi*ent until *anuarj **, ****. minqjanux ru qnxan **** kawas~ɕ,trump maki new jork zjaw na ħetaj pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,*onal* *oħn trump ħtɣan βeħ new jork militarj aʦ~ʨa*emj,ħija te pajat laqi.ħija ru marjanne,elizaβetħ,roβert ms~ɕqun mrkjaʔs~ɕ maki *amaiʦ~ʨa es~ɕtates~ɕ. mpuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ new jork zjaw na ħetaj pqwas~ɕan βiru ru **** kawas~ɕ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ *or*ħam kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ *,mus~ɕa penns~ɕjl*ania kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ la. maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,trump maɣal pajat s~ɕetoʔ ** maki *ietnam mʦ~ʨiriq. ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ, trump ru i*ana zeln**ko** ms~ɕqun la.maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nja, *onal* *r.(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ ), i*anka(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ) ru eriʦ~ʨ(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ). **** kawas~ɕ, i*ana ɣa s~ɕquilq na amerika. **** kawas~ɕ,*onal* *oħn trump ru marla maples~ɕ wal likoŋ la. ħija ru maples~ɕ maki kneril laqi nja(ti**anj lalu nja **** kawas~ɕ ħtɣan ).**** kawas~ɕ,ħija ms~ɕqun la,**** kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕqun maki,**** kawas~ɕ wal talax la. marla mlaħaŋ ti**anj maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia mrkjas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ, trump ru s~ɕlo*enian mato melania knaus~ɕs~ɕ ms~ɕqun la.ħija maki qutux laqi mlikuj nja,lalu βarron nja, ħtɣan maki **** kawas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ,melania maɣal s~ɕquilq na amerika. **** kawas~ɕ, βo*en ħtɣan βeħ kalamazoo miʦ~ʨħiɣan .ħija jaja ru jaβa kaħul netħerlan*s~ɕ ru ɣroniŋen . βo*en mrkjas~ɕ βeħ kalamazoo ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ linʦ~ʨoln pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija βlaq βalaj s~ɕquilq na pʔunro maki kalamazoo. **** kawas~ɕ.βo*en mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨentral kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ lɣa,mus~ɕa mtzjaw ħetaj la. mas~ɕoq te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa, βo*en mus~ɕa kalamazoo maki ħetaj mrħuw na amerika kraɣij,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraʦ~ʨħʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. βill mqwas~ɕ pʦ~ʨβaq βiru. inβjaqan njʦ~ʨ queens~ɕ. ħija ɣa tes~ɕaziŋ na laqi,ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ qs~ɕujan kneril,qutux qs~ɕujan mlikuj ru qutux s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj. maɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣan kneril .ʦ~ʨjux ʦ~ʨjuɣan mlikuj ru s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi nja.ʦ~ʨjux mopu s~ɕuna. s~ɕlokaħ trump ini tβaku ru nβu quo ru maniq iju. ħija ħŋan mʔaβi pajat ru maɣal ħɣa. qnxan na kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ****-**** kawas~ɕ,βo*en mqwas~ɕ βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.
S.FORM: Donald John Trump ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Donald John Trump, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw United states ta' misuw hya' ga Donald John Trump, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. He was president until January 20, 2021. minqyanux ru qnxan 1964 kawas,Trump maki New York zyaw na hetay pqwasan biru.1964 kawas 6 byacing 14 ryax,Donald John Trump htgan beh New York Military Academy,hiya te payat laqi.hiya ru Maryanne,Elizabeth,Robert msqun mrkya's maki Jamaica Estates. mpuw cyugal kawas,hiya mqwas beh New York zyaw na hetay pqwasan biru ru 1964 kawas,mqwas beh Fordham krahu' pqwasan biru.sazing kawas 後,musa Pennsylvania krahu' pqwasan biru ru 1968 kawas 5 byacing masoq mqwas la. maki krahu' pqwasan biru,Trump magal payat seto' 選秀 maki Vietnam mciriq. ngasal 1977 kawas, Trump ru Ivana Zelníčková msqun la.maki cyugal laqi nya, Donald Jr.(htgan 1977 kawas ), Ivanka(htgan 1981 kawas) ru Eric(htgan 1984 kawas). 1988 kawas, Ivana ga squilq na Amerika. 1992 kawas,Donald John Trump ru Marla Maples wal likong la. hiya ru Maples maki kneril laqi nya(Tiffany lalu nya 1993 kawas htgan ).1993 kawas,hiya msqun la,1997 kawas ini squn maki,1999 kawas wal talax la. Marla mlahang Tiffany maki California mrkyas. 2005 kawas, Trump ru Slovenian mato Melania Knauss msqun la.hiya maki qutux laqi mlikuy nya,lalu Barron nya, htgan maki 2006 kawas. 2006 kawas,Melania magal squilq na Amerika. 1925 kawas, Boven htgan beh Kalamazoo Michigan .hiya yaya ru yaba kahul Netherlands ru Groningen . Boven mrkyas beh Kalamazoo ,mqwas beh Lincoln pqwasan biru.hiya blaq balay squilq na p'unro maki Kalamazoo. 1943 kawas.Boven masoq mqwas beh Central krahu' pqwasan biru.masoq mqwas lga,musa mtzyaw hetay la. masoq te sazing cinbwanan mciriq lga, Boven musa Kalamazoo maki hetay mrhuw na Amerika kragiy,hiya mqwas beh Western Michigan krach' pqwasan biru. Bill mqwas pcbaq biru. inbyaqan NYC Queens. hiya ga tesazing na laqi,cyux sazing qsuyan kneril,qutux qsuyan mlikuy ru qutux sswe mlikuy. magan cyugan kneril .cyux cyugan mlikuy ru sazing kneril laqi nya.cyux mopu suna. slokah Trump ini tbaku ru nbu quo ru maniq iyu. hiya hngan m'abi payat ru magal hga. qnxan na krahu' pqwasan biru 1943-1946 kawas,Boven mqwas beh Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *onal* *oħn trump, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħe was~ɕ pres~ɕi*ent until *anuarj **, ****. minqjanux ru qnxan **** kawas~ɕ,trump maki new jork zjaw na ħetaj pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,*onal* *oħn trump ħtɣan βeħ new jork militarj aʦ~ʨa*emj,ħija te pajat laqi.ħija ru marjanne,elizaβetħ,roβert ms~ɕqun mrkjaʔs~ɕ maki *amaiʦ~ʨa es~ɕtates~ɕ. mpuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ new jork zjaw na ħetaj pqwas~ɕan βiru ru **** kawas~ɕ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ *or*ħam kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ *,mus~ɕa penns~ɕjl*ania kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ la. maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,trump maɣal pajat s~ɕetoʔ ** maki *ietnam mʦ~ʨiriq. ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ, trump ru i*ana zeln**ko** ms~ɕqun la.maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nja, *onal* *r.(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ ), i*anka(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ) ru eriʦ~ʨ(ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ). **** kawas~ɕ, i*ana ɣa s~ɕquilq na amerika. **** kawas~ɕ,*onal* *oħn trump ru marla maples~ɕ wal likoŋ la. ħija ru maples~ɕ maki kneril laqi nja(ti**anj lalu nja **** kawas~ɕ ħtɣan ).**** kawas~ɕ,ħija ms~ɕqun la,**** kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕqun maki,**** kawas~ɕ wal talax la. marla mlaħaŋ ti**anj maki ʦ~ʨali*ornia mrkjas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ, trump ru s~ɕlo*enian mato melania knaus~ɕs~ɕ ms~ɕqun la.ħija maki qutux laqi mlikuj nja,lalu βarron nja, ħtɣan maki **** kawas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ,melania maɣal s~ɕquilq na amerika. **** kawas~ɕ, βo*en ħtɣan βeħ kalamazoo miʦ~ʨħiɣan .ħija jaja ru jaβa kaħul netħerlan*s~ɕ ru ɣroniŋen . βo*en mrkjas~ɕ βeħ kalamazoo ,mqwas~ɕ βeħ linʦ~ʨoln pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija βlaq βalaj s~ɕquilq na pʔunro maki kalamazoo. **** kawas~ɕ.βo*en mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨentral kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.mas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ lɣa,mus~ɕa mtzjaw ħetaj la. mas~ɕoq te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq lɣa, βo*en mus~ɕa kalamazoo maki ħetaj mrħuw na amerika kraɣij,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraʦ~ʨħʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. βill mqwas~ɕ pʦ~ʨβaq βiru. inβjaqan njʦ~ʨ queens~ɕ. ħija ɣa tes~ɕaziŋ na laqi,ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ qs~ɕujan kneril,qutux qs~ɕujan mlikuj ru qutux s~ɕs~ɕwe mlikuj. maɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣan kneril .ʦ~ʨjux ʦ~ʨjuɣan mlikuj ru s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi nja.ʦ~ʨjux mopu s~ɕuna. s~ɕlokaħ trump ini tβaku ru nβu quo ru maniq iju. ħija ħŋan mʔaβi pajat ru maɣal ħɣa. qnxan na kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ****-**** kawas~ɕ,βo*en mqwas~ɕ βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.
